title: Graphic Design
heading: Professional Graphic Design Course
description: Master the art of visual communication with our Graphic Design course. Learn Photoshop, Illustrator, branding, typography, social media creatives, and real client project workflow from basics to advanced.

title: UI/UX Design
heading: Professional UI/UX Design Course
description: Learn complete UI/UX design process including user research, wireframing, prototyping, design systems, and high-fidelity app/web interface design using Figma with real-world projects.

title: Video Editing
heading: Professional Video Editing Course
description: Learn professional video editing from scratch to advanced level including cuts, transitions, color grading, motion graphics, audio sync, and reel/YouTube editing workflow using industry tools.
